Chat Edit: 'Private AV Scanning Service - Check Files Without Public Exposure
Welcome to AV-Sense!
With public scanning services sharing your files with AV vendors, it's crucial to have a private alternative for checking your tools


# Technical Features:
    Private scanning - your files stay private, period
    Results from 27 popular AVs including Defender, Kaspersky, McAfee
    Clean, modern dashboard with:
    Quick file upload & scan
    Real-time scan progress tracking
    Detailed detection breakdown for each engine
    Shareable scan result links (ID-based)
    Full scan history
    Statistics page showing:
    Your daily/monthly scan counts
    Detection ratios and trends
    Most active engines
    File type statistics
    PDF report generation
    Telegram bot for quick scans
    Dark/light theme support
    Custom display name options
    Multiple font choices
    Account balance tracking
    Scan count monitoring


Everything's designed to be straightforward - upload your file, get your results.


# DARK MODE


[Image: image.png]


# WHITE MODE


[Image: image.png]


# Pricing:

- Basic Plan: $0.30 per scan
- Personal Plan: $60 per month (200 scans)
- Professional Plan: $180 per month (600 scans)
- Enterprise Plan: $360 per month (1200 scans)

*Limited 35% discount on all plans!




To explore the functionality of AV-Sense (www.av-sense.net)
